message:
test(cass,scanner): add unit tests for untested pure functions

cass: +13 tests (ExtractKeywords, DetectTopics, ExtractSessionDate,
InjectContext, FormatContext, FormatForAgent, DefaultInjectConfig,
DefaultCASSConfig, DefaultTopicFilterConfig, NewClient options).
Coverage: 43.8% → 60.4%.

scanner: +10 tests (splitJSONAndWarnings, extractWarningLines,
sessionFromProjectKey, splitPathSegments, matchPatternSegments,
matchSegment, matchesAnyPattern, buildAssignmentMessage,
buildTargetedMessage, buildSummaryMessage).
Coverage: 44.5% → 51.9%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
